product_overview: A web platform that helps users prepare for exams through interactive practice simulations, study schedule management, performance tracking and social features. Gamification (XP and virtual currency 'Gabaritos') encourages continued practice and progress.
core_goals: Allow users to sign up and sign in to a personal study account
Let users browse and take practice exams and receive actionable results and XP
Enable users to create and manage study schedules for target exams
Provide a social feed and friends system to share progress and interact
Offer real-time direct messaging between friends
Allow users to view and edit their personal profile and track progress

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Create and access a personal account using email and password, and complete initial profile setup.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill name -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit signup form -> See /confirm-email
Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form with invalid credentials -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /complete-profile -> Provide missing profile information -> Save profile -> See /dashboard

features.name: Practice Exams
features.description: Browse available simulated exams, spend Gabaritos to start simulations, answer questions, and receive score and XP-based rewards.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/simulados -> View list of available practice exams -> Choose an exam from the list -> Start the exam -> Read first question -> Select an answer option -> Navigate between questions -> Submit exam -> View results and score
Navigate to /dashboard/simulados -> Choose an exam with a required Gabaritos cost -> Start exam when Gabaritos are available -> Observe Gabaritos deducted -> Complete exam -> Receive XP and score

features.name: Study Schedule
features.description: Create and manage study schedules for specific exams, add subjects and topics, and track progress over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/meus-estudos -> Start creating a study schedule -> Enter exam name -> Select education level -> Set exam date -> Add subjects and topics -> Create schedule -> View study schedule cards
Navigate to /dashboard/meus-estudos -> Open a schedule card -> View detailed timeline and subject breakdown -> Track progress per subject

features.name: Social Feed
features.description: Share study updates and media, view posts from friends, and interact through likes and comments.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/mural -> View feed of posts -> Create new post -> Upload images to post -> Publish post -> See post in feed
Navigate to /dashboard/mural -> View a post -> Like post -> Add a comment -> See comment appear under the post
Navigate to /dashboard/mural -> Open a user's profile from a post -> View that user's public profile

features.name: Friends Management
features.description: Find other users, send and respond to friend requests, and maintain a friends list for social and messaging features.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/amigos -> View list of friends -> Search for users -> Send friend request -> See pending outgoing request
Navigate to /dashboard/amigos -> View incoming friend requests -> Accept friend request -> See new friend in friends list
Navigate to /dashboard/amigos -> View a friend in the list -> Remove friend -> See friend removed from the list

features.name: Direct Messaging
features.description: Send and receive messages with friends and keep conversation history grouped by date.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/chat -> View list of conversations -> Open a conversation -> Type message -> Send message -> See message appear in conversation history
Navigate to /dashboard/chat -> Open a conversation -> Scroll through history -> See messages grouped by date

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and update personal profile information, upload an avatar, and manage basic account details.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/perfil -> View profile information and current XP and Gabaritos balance
Navigate to /dashboard/perfil -> Edit name and bio -> Upload profile photo -> Save changes -> See updated profile information
Navigate to /complete-profile -> Fill required profile fields after signup -> Save profile -> Be redirected to /dashboard

routes.description: Landing page with features and call to action
View study guide for a subject
Social feed with posts and interactions

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and signup with email and password using Supabase
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Fill signup form with name, email, password

features.name: Practice Exams
features.description: Browse and take practice exams with questions and answers
user_interactions: View list of available practice exams
Read questions with charts, tables, and images

features.name: Study Schedule
features.description: Create and manage study schedules for exams
user_interactions: Click on schedule to view details

features.name: Social Feed
features.description: View and interact with posts from friends
user_interactions: Click on user avatar to view profile

features.name: Friends Management
features.description: Add friends, view friend list, and manage friend requests

features.name: Direct Messaging
user_interactions: Click on contact to open chat

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and edit user profile information

known_limitations.issue: Chart rendering on mobile has overflow issues
known_limitations.impact: Charts may be difficult to read on small screens

known_limitations.issue: Modal dialogs may have horizontal scroll on very small screens
known_limitations.impact: User experience degraded on devices under 320px width
